Venus and Saturn are bosom friends. They are conjoined together
in the Kona sign. Venus is the only Rajayoga adhipathi. So it must bring
fortune.
In other words from uttrakalamrita if Venus or Saturn happen to
produce Rajayoga. if either is strong by occupying either exalted sign or
own or Vargotham amsa one must beg alms in the street even when
one is born very rkh. If one quotes this stoka, another person born with
